command.title: Run Command
command.description: Override a custom command to the compose file
command.warning: Modifying the default command may affect deployment stability, impacting logs and monitoring. Proceed carefully and test thoroughly. By default, the command starts with docker.

isolation.title: Enable Isolated Deployment
isolation.descriptionIntro: Configure isolated deployment to the compose file.
isolation.descriptionBody: This feature creates an isolated environment for your deployment by adding unique prefixes to all resources. It establishes a dedicated network based on your compose file's name, ensuring your services run in isolation. This prevents conflicts when running multiple instances of the same template or services with identical names.
isolation.switchDescription: Enable isolated deployment to the compose file.
isolation.dialogDescription: Preview of the compose file with isolated deployment configuration
